_comment: Drop-in snippets for OpenCode MCP config. Original work — MIT.
_location: opencode.json (or opencode.jsonc) at the project root, OR ~/.config/opencode/config.json for global
_usage: Merge these entries under the top-level mcp key. Adapt URLs/ports if your servers print different ones. Set enabled:false to keep an entry but disable it.
_format_note: OpenCode uses 'type: local' (stdio command) or 'type: remote' (HTTP/SSE URL).
_optional_tool_gating_example: Uncomment the 'tools' block below to disable these MCPs globally and only enable them for a specific RE agent.
